title: Wheelchair - Pig
description: The texture pack replaces the essence of a pig with a wheelchair with animation of movement.
body:
![Wheelchair animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6c7e2b35167dc29f7f4d428707441334713c131.gif)

The texture pack replaces the pig model with a wheelchair and adds a texture for a fishing rod with carrots. To change the model, the pig must be renamed with a tag.
## Required mods:
> [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
## Renames:
> Pig - _Wheelchair_ // Fishing rod with carrots - _Wheelchair_



Текстур пак заменяет модель свиньи на инвалидное кресло, добавляет текстуру для удочки с морковью. Для изменения модели свинью необходимо переименовать биркой.
## Необходимые моды:
> [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
## Переименования:
> Свинья - _Wheelchair_ // Удочка с морковью - _Wheelchair_
